flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Indiana State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (6.6k vs 8.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Indiana State University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (7.7k → 6.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Indiana State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Indiana State University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (28.3% → 32.9%).
